source_pr.title: parser: parse position expression in parser, fix order by position.
source_pr.body:
The position expression, like "1" in "order by 1" was parsed ito `*ast.ValueExpr` in parser, replaced to position expression by resolver,
But flag setter sets flag before resolving process, so position flag is not set.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR (parser: parse position expression in parser, fix order by position.) appears to be primarily a functional/correctness change or refactor. The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
